AWC.Settings.ThresholdLight.Name: Unarmored → Light Threshold (%)
AWC.Settings.ThresholdLight.Hint: Equipped armor weight as % of capacity at which the bracket shifts from Unarmored to Light. Default: 25
AWC.Settings.ThresholdMedium.Name: Light → Medium Threshold (%)
AWC.Settings.ThresholdMedium.Hint: % at which the bracket shifts from Light to Medium. Default: 50
AWC.Settings.ThresholdHeavy.Name: Medium → Heavy Threshold (%)
AWC.Settings.ThresholdHeavy.Hint: % at which the bracket shifts from Medium to Heavy. Default: 75
AWC.Settings.ThresholdOver.Name: Heavy → Overburdened Threshold (%)
AWC.Settings.ThresholdOver.Hint: % at which the bracket shifts from Heavy to Overburdened. Default: 100
AWC.Settings.ApplyPenalties.Name: Apply Bracket Penalties
AWC.Settings.ApplyPenalties.Hint: Apply speed and disadvantage penalties for Medium, Heavy, and Overburdened brackets.
AWC.Settings.ShowACBreakdown.Name: Show AC Breakdown
AWC.Settings.ShowACBreakdown.Hint: Display the formula breakdown (10 + max(DEX/CON) + items + misc) on the character sheet.
AWC.Settings.BracketThresholds.Name: Bracket Thresholds (advanced)
AWC.Settings.BracketThresholds.Hint: Raw threshold object. Edit via the settings sliders above.
